nodes.context: Criminal organisation based in Melbourne, Australia, involved in racketeering, murder, drug trafficking, etc.
Mostly Irish criminal family based in Melbourne.
Criminal syndicate led by Carl Williams, rival to Carlton Crew.
Criminal group allied with Carlton Crew.

edges.evidence_quote: The organisation was a fierce rival to the Honoured Society and the Calabrese Family
edges.context: The Carlton Crew was a fierce rival to the Honoured Society.
